The '''Verne''' were herd animals native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. They were hunted mainly for their [[Leather/Legends|leathery]] hides. On the bulls, six horns protruded from the back of the head. They somewhat resembled the [[Ikopi/Legends|ikopi]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Verne_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Verne appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
